caption: Education Level Survey Results
description: A pie chart showing the distribution of education levels among 122 respondents. The largest segment is 'Bachelor's Degree or Higher' at 76.2%, followed by 'Upper Secondary' at 18%.

caption: Profession Survey Results
description: A pie chart showing the distribution of professions among 122 respondents. Key segments include 'Youth Worker' and 'Project Manager' both at 19.7%, 'Social Entrepreneur' at 18.9%, and 'Educator/Trainer' at 12.3%.
